text:
= Beneficiary met claims criteria and had sufficient FFS coverage 
COMMENT: 
This variable is populated beginning in 2018. 
The condition variable requires beneficiaries to satisfy both claims criteria (a minimum number/type 
of Medicare claims that have the proper diagnosis codes and occurred within a specified time period) 
and coverage criteria (Medicare FFS Part A and Part B coverage during the entire specified time 
period). 
For chronic pain, beneficiaries must have at least one Medicare
